compressed_prompt: compose a lowercase letter to a friend, urging them to vote, no commas or informal tone.
response:
dear friend

the upcoming election is a critical moment for our community. your voice matters a great deal. i urge you to make a plan to vote. research the candidates and the issues. ensure your registration is current. cast your ballot on election day or by an approved early method. your participation is essential. please vote.

sincerely
